chunks.text: Technical Reports - 1982. VLSI Implementation of Digital Fourier Transforms, Final Report (CSD-82-111) by Alvin M. Despain, Carlo H. Séquin, Clark D. Thompson, E. Wold and D. Lioupis. On the Foundations of Artificial Workload Design (CSD-82-110) by Domenico Ferrari. Working Set Size Strings (CSD-82-109) by Domenico Ferrari. The Properties and Limiting Behavior of Working Set Size Strings and Flat-faults (CSD-82-108) by Tzong-yu Paul Lee. X-Tree and Y-Components (CSD-82-107) by Carlo H. Séquin and Richard M. Fujimoto. Design and Implementation of RISC I (CSD-82-106) by Carlo H. Séquin and David A. Patterson. Fourier Transforms in VLSI (CSD-82-105) by Clark D. Thompson. Talking to UNIX in English: An Overview of an On-line UNIX Consultant (CSD-82-104) by Robert Wilensky. Solving the Weighted Parity Problem for Gammoids by Reduction to Graphic Matching (CSD-82-103) by Po Tong, Eugene L. Lawler and V. V. Vazirani. RESST: A VLSI Implementation of a Record-Sorting Stack (CSD-82-102) by Clark D. Thompson, Michael J. Carey and Paul M. Hansen. An Efficient Implementation of Search Trees on O(lg N) Processors (CSD-82-101) by Clark D. Thompson and Michael J. Carey.
